heading: Savings provision
label: 8574 Savings provision
text: No additional Federal funds are authorized to carry out the requirements of this Act and the activities authorized by this Act are subject to the availability of appropriations made in advance for such purposes.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Expanding Public Lands Outdoor Recreation Experiences Act and also as the EXPLORE Act, which enacted this chapter and enacted, amended, and repealed numerous other sections and notes in the Code. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 118–234138 Stat. 2836section 8401 of this titleJan. 4, 2025
